loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive energy for the panel's fed feeders (UPS-01/02/03, BPDB-01/02, UPS-04). Solar incomers and transformers are dark (no data) and excluded from the rollup.

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing energy trend for 6 active feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark (no data) and honest-blank their slots.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing live apparent power and active/reactive breakdown for all fed feeders. Capacity marker (rated kVA) and worst-peak markers are omitted because the asset's nameplate capacity is unknown (rated_kva is '—').

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing demand distribution for UPS and BPDB feeders; HHF feeders are not present in this panel's roster and will render as null.
